items.name: Quantum Entangler
items.description: Create a clone of yourself and then choose to control youself or the clone.  Be careful, when clones are created there is a shock to the entire game!

items.name: Binoculray
items.description: Binoculrays allow you to see further than you've ever been able to before.  They're so powerful, you'll even be able to see through walls.

items.name: Sword of the Waves
items.description: If the ocean waves, it's polite to wave back. Click to slash, keep clicking to unleash a watery torrent at your foes.

items.name: Red Carpet Hoverboard
items.description: Now you can hover in style!

items.name: Speedy Cleats
items.description: Nice to CLEAT you! Equip this gear to double your speed!

items.name: Super Spy Laser Blaster
items.description: Left click to unleash a beam of energy that is dynamically lit along its length.  Deals 45 damage per second while the beam is on the target.

items.name: Year of the Snake Lantern
items.description: Carry this lantern and let the snakes protect you.  The spirits of snake ancestors will follow you around and harm anyone they touch (everyone other than you of course!).

items.name: Saxophone
items.description: Saxomaphone....saxomaphone..tubamaphone?

items.name: Chameleon Potion
items.description: No it's not a karma chameleon - and thank goodness for that!  This will transform your appearance to be like whatever you click.  Now you see me... now you think I'm a grey baseboard.

items.name: 8-Bit Throwing Barrel
items.description: They'll never get the princess now! MUAHAHAHAHA

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Hydrian Elixir
items.description: Over the centuries, many have wondered how the KoSS descend upon the realm in times of peril. Only but a few know, the true source of the KoSS' power. The Hydrian Elixir grants the KoSS the ability to grow wings and fly for a short period of time. Not only does the elixir give them the ability of flight, but also increases their strength twofold and the wings attack anyone that get near them!

items.name: Dragonheart Sword & Shield
items.description: The boldest of the bold, fight with the greedy heart of a dragon.  Swing and lunge at your enemies or press 'Q' to block damage.

items.name: Torso Cannon
items.description: Yummy yummy yummy, I've got cannons in my tummy!

items.name: Mega Mallet
items.description: Get ready to lower the BOOM! Click to swing at enemies; dealing anywhere from 20 to 30 damage. Double click to slam the mallet against the ground - dealing 80 damage to anybody hit.

items.name: Ro-torcycle
items.description: Ride around ROBLOX on your tricked out Ro-torcycle.  Features dynamically lit headlight and sweet rotating wheels.

items.name: Korblox Evil Eye
items.description: The Korblox place their evil eye on walls or even directly on enemies to spy on them at every turn. Then when the moment is right....kaboom!

items.name: Statue Staff of Stony Justice
items.description: Your enemies will have a heart of stone.  Because you've petrified them!  Petrifies your enemies 1/10 times.

items.name: Noxious Chocolate
items.description: Share this candy with your enemies.  Forces them to eat the candy (which is poisonous) and causes them to drop their weapons!

items.name: Dual Wield Ninja Scythes
items.description: Double the scythes, double the damage. Slash at your opponents to do 15 damage per hit!

items.name: Knights of the Seventh Sanctum: Sword and Shield
items.description: With their duty to stabilize Robloxia, they care not for what is right nor for what is wrong, but for stability. They are dangerous beyond belief and their undead nature strikes fear into the hearts of their enemies
